## Community Profile Submission

**Folder:** `community/<your-github-handle>-<descriptive-name>/`

### Checklist

- [ ] Copied template: `cp -r community/TEMPLATE community/<handle>-<name>`
- [ ] Replaced `profiles.toml` with output of `am export -p <profile>`
- [ ] Edited `README.md` frontmatter (`author`, `description`, `category`, `tags`, `profiles`)
- [ ] README explains what the aliases do and how to use them
- [ ] Only added/modified files in my own `community/<handle>-<name>/` folder
- [ ] Tested import works: `am import community/<handle>-<name>/profiles.toml --yes`

### What does this profile collection do?
